programs.programName: AHCCCS (Arizona Long Term Care System - ALTCS)

verified.notes: No age requirement found; program active as ALTCS under AHCCCS in 2026. Income limits available but not requested in schema. Assets from non-.gov citing state aid; no official .gov financial limits in results. Phone from non-.gov.

programs.programName: ALTCS Home and Community-Based Services (HCBS) Waiver

verified.notes: No official .gov source found for financial limits; used current non-gov sources citing state standards. Age is 65+ or 18+ with disabilities per non-gov source, but no minimum age integer specified. Assets individual from one source ($2000), conflicting higher max resource ($162660) in another; couple case-by-case.

programs.programName: Arizona Medicare Savings Programs (QMB, SLMB, QI)

verified.notes: No official .gov or state agency source provides specific 2026 dollar amounts for income or assets; official AHCCCS pages use FPL percentages only (e.g., QMB <=100% FPL, SLMB <=120%, QI <=135%). Non-gov sources conflict on values.
